jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Bewakoof
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bewakoof! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bewakoof:
Bewakoof is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof!
